style.aesthetic: flat minimal UI, fine-line borders, structured card layout, clean tech illustration inspired by modern SaaS design (Linear, Vercel aesthetic)
style.rendering: clean vector style, flat surfaces with 1px borders, no gradients on surfaces, sharp but refined edges, subtle depth through layering and thin shadows only

background.overlay: subtle orthogonal grid pattern of thin straight lines at very low opacity (2-3%), spaced 60px apart horizontally and vertically, matching the website's signature blueprint-style background grid — no hexagonal, no diagonal, strictly rectangular

headline.position: top center, above the main illustration
headline.style: clean geometric sans-serif, tight letter-spacing (-0.04em), matching the website's heading style exactly
headline.size: extra large, dominant headline, approximately 15-20% of image height
headline.effects: none — clean white text on dark background, no glow, no shadow, relying on contrast alone

subtitle.style: clean geometric sans-serif, matching nav link styling
subtitle.effects: none — uses the website's text-secondary color for visual hierarchy, clean and muted

text_overlay.hierarchy: headline in white is primary, subtitle in muted gray (#8A8F98) creates the same primary/secondary text hierarchy used throughout the website

ui_windows.type: main card panel — Cowork audit review interface
ui_windows.style: white (#FFFFFF) filled rectangle with 1px solid border in rgba(255,255,255,0.15), border-radius 12px (--radius-md), very subtle shadow (0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)), flat and clean
ui_windows.details: central main card showing a Cowork document analysis view: at the top a pill-shaped badge (border-radius 999px, 1px border) reading 'Dokumentenprüfung' with a gold dot (#FFD166). Below, a structured review list styled like the website's info-row component — horizontal rows separated by 1px bottom borders, each with a label on the left in 14px #8A8F98 and a status value on the right in 14px semibold. Four rows: 'Prozessdokumentation' → checkmark icon in #06D6A0, 'Risikobewertung' → checkmark in #06D6A0, 'Maßnahmenplan' → circular arrow icon in #FFD166 (in progress), 'Auditbericht' → clock icon in #8A8F98 (pending). Matches the website's detail-sidebar info-row pattern exactly

ui_windows.style: white filled rectangle, 1px solid border rgba(255,255,255,0.15), border-radius 12px, flat card
ui_windows.details: a quality audit checklist with a header in uppercase 12px semibold letter-spacing 0.05em reading 'AUDIT-CHECKLISTE' (matching the website's .footer-heading style). Below, 5 checklist items as small rows: three with filled square checkboxes in #06D6A0 (passed — 'ISO 9001 konform', 'Dokumentenlenkung', 'Korrekturmaßnahmen'), one with a warning triangle icon in #FFD166 ('Lieferantenbewertung — Nachbesserung'), one with an empty square checkbox in 1px #8A8F98 ('Management Review — ausstehend'). Each item in 13px, clean and compact. Represents Cowork's ability to systematically review compliance documents against quality standards

ui_windows.style: white filled rectangle, 1px solid border rgba(255,255,255,0.15), border-radius 12px, flat card
ui_windows.details: a simplified horizontal process flowchart showing 4 steps connected by thin arrow lines (1px, #8A8F98): rounded rectangles (6px radius, 1px border) labeled 'Ist-Analyse' (#118AB2 left border accent), 'Bewertung' (#FFD166 left border accent), 'Maßnahmen' (#06D6A0 left border accent), 'Nachverfolgung' (#118AB2 left border accent). Between 'Bewertung' and 'Maßnahmen' a small diamond decision node (rotated square, 1px border). The left-border accent style matches how the website uses colored indicators on list items. Represents how Cowork maps and improves consulting and QM workflows

ui_windows.style: white filled rectangle, 1px solid border rgba(255,255,255,0.15), border-radius 12px, flat card
ui_windows.details: a compact KPI dashboard with three metric blocks arranged horizontally, each separated by 1px vertical dividers. First metric: '94%' in large 28px semibold #06D6A0 with label 'Konformität' in 11px #8A8F98 below. Second metric: '12' in 28px semibold #FFD166 with label 'Offene Punkte' below. Third metric: '3' in 28px semibold #EF476F with label 'Kritisch' below. Below the three metrics, a thin horizontal bar (4px height, 6px radius) showing proportional segments: large #06D6A0 segment, smaller #FFD166 segment, tiny #EF476F segment — a quality health bar. Represents Cowork's ability to synthesize audit findings into executive-level quality dashboards

icons.style: small circles (8-10px diameter) with 2px solid border ring, matching the website's badge-dot pattern: #06D6A0 fill for completed, #FFD166 fill for active, #118AB2 fill for queued — no glow, simple flat dots
icons.details: 5 small status dots connected by thin 1px lines (rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) to the main audit review card, each with a tiny label in 11px #8A8F98 — 'Dokumente' (document scanning), 'Checkliste' (checklist generation), 'Prozesse' (process mapping), 'Metriken' (KPI extraction), 'Bericht' (report drafting) — representing parallel sub-agents reviewing different quality dimensions simultaneously
icons.position: distributed along the left and bottom edges of the main card panel

decorative.style: thin solid strokes (1px) in rgba(255,255,255,0.12), with small arrow tips, no gradient, no glow
decorative.details: clean straight paths with right-angle turns connecting the main audit card to the checklist, process flow, and dashboard cards — showing the consulting workflow: document review → audit assessment → process analysis → quality reporting

decorative.style: outline only in rgba(255,255,255,0.25), 1px stroke weight, matching the website's SVG icon style (20×20px viewBox, stroke-width 2, stroke-linecap round, stroke-linejoin round)
decorative.details: small symbols as subtle ambient elements between cards: a magnifying glass (Analyse), a shield with checkmark (Compliance), a clipboard (Audit), a circular arrow loop (Kontinuierliche Verbesserung), a document with seal (Zertifizierung). Purely structural outlines, no fill, no glow

decorative.style: two thin horizontal bars stacked vertically (4px height, 6px radius each, spaced 8px apart) with labels
decorative.details: top bar labeled 'Ist' in 11px #8A8F98, filled to 65% in #118AB2. Bottom bar labeled 'Soll' in 11px #8A8F98, filled to 100% as a 1px outline in rgba(255,255,255,0.2) with a dashed target line. The gap between fill levels is visually clear. Positioned as a floating element near the dashboard card, representing quality gap analysis — a core consulting deliverable that Cowork can generate from audit data

decorative.style: pill-shaped badges (border-radius 999px) with 1px border and transparent fill, matching the website's .badge component exactly
decorative.details: three small tags floating near the main card: '.pdf' (dot in #EF476F — for audit reports), '.xlsx' (dot in #118AB2 — for finding matrices), '.docx' (dot in #06D6A0 — for process documentation). Font-size 11px, font-weight 500

decorative.style: small rounded rectangle (6px radius, 1px border in rgba(255,255,255,0.2)) with a thin shield or seal icon on the left and text on the right
decorative.details: a small floating element reading 'ISO 9001' in 11px semibold white, with a tiny shield outline icon in #06D6A0 to the left — representing quality certification standards. Positioned near the audit checklist card. Clean and minimal, matching the website's badge aesthetic

composition.layout: headline 'Beratung & QM' and subtitle 'Claude Cowork' at top center; main audit review card positioned center-left as focal anchor; audit checklist card to the upper right; process flow diagram card as a horizontal element spanning center-bottom below the main card; quality metrics dashboard card at lower right; sub-agent dots distributed along left edge of main card; gap analysis bars floating between dashboard and process flow; certification badge near checklist
composition.depth: subtle z-axis layering through shadow depth only. Text on topmost layer with no effects. Main card slightly forward with 2px shadow. Satellite cards at same depth with 1px shadows. Decorative elements flat in background. Minimal depth — flat design with barely-there shadows matching the website's aesthetic
composition.negative_space: generous space reserved at top for headline and subtitle (top 25%), wide breathing room between all cards (minimum 24px gaps matching the website's grid gap), dark background grid visible between panels

technical.text: Headline: Beratung & QM | Subtitle: Claude Cowork — both in Switzer font, fully readable, high contrast against #073B4C background
technical.no: 3d perspective, photorealism, people, stock photo elements, competitor logos, cluttered overlapping, terminal/command line interface, code editors, programming syntax, glassmorphism, frosted glass, backdrop blur, glow effects, neon effects, gradient fills on surfaces, rounded blob shapes, organic shapes

color_palette.text_primary: #FFFFFF (white — inverted from the website's #111111 for dark background context)
color_palette.card_border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) (light border — adapted from the website's #eaeaea for dark background)
color_palette.accent: #FFD166 (golden yellow — the website's --accent, for in-progress and warning-level findings)
color_palette.info: #118AB2 (ocean blue — the website's --info, for analytical elements and Ist-state indicators)
color_palette.success: #06D6A0 (mint — the website's --success, for passed audits and conformity states)
color_palette.warning: #EF476F (coral pink — the website's --warning, for critical findings and non-conformities)
color_palette.border_radius: 6px for small elements (--radius-sm), 12px for cards (--radius-md), 999px for pill badges
